Metadata.title: Apiflow — Open-source API documentation, debugging, mocking, and testing
Metadata.description: A modern API documentation and testing tool—an open-source alternative to Postman and Apifox.

产品展示_Agent_描述: An AI assistant that generates API requests, manages variables, and runs workflows. Compatible with multiple AI models to streamline API workflows.
产品展示_Mock_描述: Instantly mock API responses—no backend required.
产品展示_SSE_描述: Built-in Server-Sent Events (SSE) support for real-time streaming and visualization. Debug faster with instant response capture.
关于我们_副标题: With AI, we’re rebuilding a new generation of productivity tools at a fraction of the cost. We’re exploring how solo builders can compete with teams—follow along if that excites you.
关于区块_简介: Our mission is to make API development faster, easier, and more enjoyable for developers everywhere.
关于区块_使命_正文: To empower developers with an intuitive, powerful, and collaborative API platform. Great APIs are the foundation of great software—we're here to make API development effortless and enjoyable.
关于区块_价值观_开发者优先_描述: Every feature is built with developers in mind. We know the workflow—we're developers too.
关于区块_价值观_社区驱动_描述: Your feedback shapes our roadmap. We build what you need, not what we think you need.
关于区块_价值观_创新_描述: We push the boundaries of what’s possible in API development and testing.
关于区块_价值观_卓越_描述: We obsess over every detail—UX, performance, and reliability.
关于区块_历程_2022_描述: We started with a simple goal: make API development easier for everyone.
关于区块_历程_2023_描述: Hit our first major milestone—with overwhelmingly positive feedback from the community.
关于区块_历程_2024_描述: Launched our biggest release yet—features that dramatically speed up API development.
关于区块_历程_2024b_描述: A growing community of developers using Apiflow every day.
关于区块_团队_成员1_简介: Former lead engineer at leading tech companies. Passionate about developer tools and API architecture.
关于区块_团队_成员2_简介: Full-stack developer with 10+ years of experience. Focused on distributed systems and API design.
关于区块_团队_成员3_简介: Product leader with deep empathy for developer workflows and team collaboration.
关于区块_团队_成员4_简介: UX/UI designer focused on intuitive interfaces for complex technical tools.
关于区块_CTA_描述: Join us if you're passionate about developer tools and want to build something meaningful.
联系_副标题: Have questions or need a hand getting started? We’re here to help.
联系_表单_消息_占位: Tell us how we can help…
联系_方式_聊天_描述: Ask questions and get quick help
联系_CTA_描述: Start building better APIs today—free and open source forever.
联系_FAQ_Q1: How do I get started with Apiflow?
联系_FAQ_A1: Download Apiflow and start using it right away. No credit card, no trial—just free and open source.
联系_FAQ_Q2: Can I import my existing Postman collections?
联系_FAQ_A2: Yes. We provide import tools to migrate collections from Postman, Insomnia, and other popular API tools.
联系_FAQ_A3: Yes. Apiflow supports self-hosting and local deployment, including Docker-based setups.
联系_FAQ_A4: We integrate with popular tools like GitHub, GitLab, Slack, and Jira. See the integrations docs for details.
联系_FAQ_A5: Yes. You can self-host Apiflow, and we recommend standard best practices like TLS, least-privilege access, and regular key rotation.
联系_FAQ_A6: Yes. Apiflow is open source, and all core features are free to use—forever.
联系_支持时间: Support hours: Monday–Friday, 9 AM–6 PM PST
🚀 新功能：高级 API 测试功能现已上线: 🚀 New: Advanced API Testing Features Now Available
Postman 和 Apifox 的: A truly open-source API platform — free, powerful, and developer-first
除协作外可以使用所有功能: Work offline with full functionality (collaboration available when online).
所有功能支持Docker本地部署: Self-host anywhere with full Docker support
可随时导出数据到其他工具: Export your data at any time
所有核心功能永久免费使用: All core features are free — forever.
支持HTTP、WebSocket等协议: Supports HTTP, WebSocket, and extensible protocols.
在 Vibe Coding 的支持下，个人开发者或小团队同样能够构建媲美企业级应: A modern API development and testing platform supporting HTTP, WebSocket, and multiple protocols. Built for modern teams with offline support, collaboration, mock servers — fully open source and free.
部分竞品仅在付费版本中支持的功能，Apiflow 在免费版中也能体验。: Features others charge for — included for free in Apiflow.
我们持续追求卓越，致力于打造更好的产品体验。: A transparent comparison focused on real developer needs.
开发者喜爱的现代化 API 文档与测试工具。轻松构建、测试和记录您的 API。: Modern API documentation and testing tool loved by developers. Build, test, and document your APIs with ease.
Apiflow 是一个开源项目，欢迎社区贡献: Apiflow is open source—community contributions are welcome.
使用文档_简介: Explore key Apiflow workflows, from first run to advanced scenarios.
使用文档_章节_文档结构_描述: Give your team a predictable structure so everyone finds answers quickly.
使用文档_章节_文档结构_要点1: Introduction & context: outline the project goal, audience, and core value.
使用文档_章节_文档结构_要点2: Quick start: show how to create a workspace, import APIs, and make the first call.
使用文档_章节_文档结构_要点3: Deep reference: document endpoints, parameters, sample responses, and error codes.
使用文档_章节_快速开始_描述: Follow these steps to set up the basics in minutes.
使用文档_章节_快速开始_步骤1: Create a project: spin up an environment and invite collaborators.
使用文档_章节_快速开始_步骤2: Sync endpoints: import OpenAPI, Postman collections, or craft requests manually.
使用文档_章节_快速开始_步骤3: Verify flows: run test suites and capture notable changes.
使用文档_章节_深入探索_描述: Keep teams aligned with these capabilities.
使用文档_章节_深入探索_要点1: Collaborative notes: leave context, approvals, and TODOs on endpoints or cases.
使用文档_章节_深入探索_要点2: Versioning: branch per environment and track change history.
使用文档_章节_深入探索_要点3: Automation: combine assertions, scripts, and schedules to protect quality.
使用文档_章节_常见问题_描述: A quick selection of questions teams ask during rollout.
使用文档_章节_常见问题_Q1: How do we share docs with external partners?
使用文档_章节_常见问题_A1: Generate read-only links or export a static site, and guard access with tokens.
使用文档_章节_常见问题_A2: Define variables per environment and toggle the context before sending requests.
使用文档_章节_常见问题_Q3: How do we keep documentation up to date?
使用文档_章节_常见问题_A3: Use auto-sync and changelogs to trigger reviews when things change.
部署教程_简介: Step-by-step instructions to launch Apiflow in your stack.
部署教程_章节_准备工作_描述: Make sure the basics are in place before you begin.
部署教程_章节_准备工作_要点1: Server requirements: >=2 CPU cores, 4 GB RAM, with 80/443 open.
部署教程_章节_准备工作_要点2: Tooling: Docker 24+, Docker Compose, Git, and a Node.js runtime.
部署教程_章节_准备工作_要点3: Domain & TLS: prepare a reachable domain and plan for Let's Encrypt certificates.
部署教程_章节_部署流程_描述: We recommend Docker Compose for the fastest rollout.
部署教程_章节_部署流程_步骤1: Clone the repository and switch to the deployment directory.
部署教程_章节_部署流程_步骤2: Configure variables: copy the env template and fill database or storage values.
部署教程_章节_部署流程_步骤3: Start services: run docker compose up -d and confirm with container logs.
部署教程_章节_环境变量_描述: Detailed configuration guide to ensure all services run properly.
部署教程_章节_安全_描述: Essential security hardening measures for production environments.
部署教程_章节_安全_要点1: JWT Secret: Modify jwtConfig.secretOrPrivateKey in packages/server/src/config/config.default.ts, replace default 'apiflow' with a complex random string.
部署教程_章节_安全_要点2: MongoDB Security: Set strong passwords, enable authentication, restrict network access, rotate passwords regularly. Use passwords with uppercase, lowercase, numbers and special characters.
部署教程_章节_安全_要点3: File Upload Limits: Configure file size limits (default 5MB) and allowed file types, clean expired files regularly, set proper directory permissions.
部署教程_章节_安全_要点4: HTTPS Configuration: Use Let's Encrypt free certificates or purchase commercial certificates, configure nginx SSL, enable HSTS and security headers.
部署教程_章节_备份_描述: Regular backups to prevent data loss.
部署教程_章节_备份_步骤1: MongoDB Backup: docker exec apiflow-mongo mongodump --username=admin --password=your_password --authenticationDatabase=admin --out=/backup
部署教程_章节_备份_步骤2: File Backup: Backup /data/apiflow_upload directory and Docker volumes (mongo_data, server_logs).
部署教程_章节_备份_步骤3: Scheduled Backups: Use cron jobs to run backup scripts daily at midnight, retain last 7 days backups, store backups off-site.
部署教程_章节_监控_要点1: View Logs: docker logs -f apiflow-server for real-time logs, log files located in server_logs volume with daily rotation.
部署教程_章节_监控_要点2: Health Check: Visit http://your-domain/api/health to check service status, returns {"status":"ok"} when healthy.
部署教程_章节_监控_要点3: Resource Monitoring: Use docker stats to view container resource usage, recommend Prometheus + Grafana for visualization and alerting.
部署教程_章节_运维_描述: Keep the platform stable with these routines.
部署教程_章节_运维_要点1: Backups: export databases and object storage snapshots regularly.
部署教程_章节_运维_要点2: Upgrades: pull new images, validate in staging, then roll out to production.
部署教程_章节_运维_要点3: Monitoring: alert on traffic, response time, and resource usage thresholds.
部署教程_章节_排障_描述: Check these tips first when something goes wrong.
部署教程_章节_排障_问题1_描述: Check docker logs for error messages, verify ports 80/443 are not occupied, confirm .env file is configured correctly, ensure Docker version >= 24.
部署教程_章节_排障_问题2_描述: Check firewall rules (open ports 80/443), verify nginx container is running, check DNS resolution for domain, review nginx logs for proxy issues.
部署教程_章节_排障_问题3_描述: Confirm MongoDB container passes health check, verify MONGO_ROOT_USERNAME and MONGO_ROOT_PASSWORD configuration, check server logs for connection errors.
部署教程_章节_排障_问题4_描述: Check if server and website containers are running, review nginx error logs, confirm inter-service network connectivity, try restarting related containers.
部署教程_章节_排障_问题5_描述: Check if web container is running, clear browser cache and retry, review nginx access logs for request paths, verify file permissions and nginx configuration.
产品展示_描述: Explore highlights of what’s coming next in Apiflow. More details soon.
注：部分功能因版本不同可能略有差异: Note: Some features may vary slightly depending on the version
基本 HTTP 请求方法支持 (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE,: Basic HTTP Methods (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH, HEAD, OPTIONS)
